summary: Iter 162 — Validated the new 3-step AddUserWizard on /admin/users for the super_admin login. End-to-end happy path passed: (1) Header split-button — clicking [data-testid='add-user-dropdown'] reveals the popover and [data-testid='standard-add-btn'] opens [data-testid='setup-wizard']. (2) All 3 left-rail step indicators present: wizard-step-indicator-basics, -role, -permissions. (3) Step 1 — basics: wiz-user-name + wiz-user-email + wiz-user-phone render; wiz-user-invite-toggle aria-checked toggles true→false→true; password label correctly switches: invite ON → 'Starting password (optional)', invite OFF → 'Password *'. Empty-Next on step 1 does NOT auto-advance (validation in place; per-field inline messages are not surfaced through .error/[role=alert] selectors but the wizard remained on step 1). (4) Step 2 — role: all 5 presets render — wiz-user-role-owner, -manager, -staff, -customer, -admin (admin visible because super_admin is logged in). wiz-operator-picker is hidden by default (role='customer') and appears immediately after clicking wiz-user-role-staff. Operator Select populated 6 operators including 'Musango Bus Service'. (5) Step 3 — permissions: with role=staff all 8 scoped permission checkboxes render (wiz-user-perm-bookings.view/manage, services.view/manage, reports.view/export, settings.view/manage). Switching to role=customer shows the 'Customer accounts don't require explicit permissions…' notice as expected. Operator selection state persists across back/forward navigation in the wizard. (6) Finish: clicking wizard-finish-btn POSTs to /api/users/create and shows [data-testid='user-invite-result-dialog'] with copyable invite link (https://…/verify-account?token=…), Copy/Done buttons, and title '🔗 Share invite link' (because Resend sandbox returns email_status='failed' — expected per agent note). Test user created with email test_wiz_408de353@example.com.

issues: Carry-over from iter 161 — Radix console error still emitted on open: '`DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' Fires twice (once for the SetupWizard, once for the invite-result dialog). a11y/console regression. Wrap the SetupWizard root title in a real <DialogTitle> (or VisuallyHidden) to silence.

action_items: (a11y, low) Resolve the Radix DialogTitle warning that fires on every open of [data-testid='setup-wizard'] and on the user-invite-result-dialog. Same warning reported in iter 161 — still unresolved.

(low) Empty-Next on step 1 does NOT bubble validation messages to a generic .error/[role=alert] container — wizard correctly blocks progression, but consider surfacing an inline 'Full name is required / Email is required' notice in the wizard body so user knows why Next was a no-op.
critical_code_review_comments: AddUserWizard.jsx ROLE_PRESETS.customer.requires === 'customer' but the rest of the system treats 'customer' as the role string itself; reading data.role downstream is fine, but the asymmetry (requires=='operator'|'admin'|'customer') reads oddly — consider renaming `requires` → `role` for clarity.

AddUserWizard.jsx line 73: operators fetched via api.get('/operators/') but the result is cached for the lifetime of the wizard (operators.length > 0 short-circuits). If a super_admin creates a new operator in another tab and immediately opens the wizard, they won't appear until reload. Minor UX; consider adding a refresh button or always refetching on open.

Users.jsx line 769: invite-result Dialog is rendered conditionally via `open={!!lastUserInvite}` but the DialogTitle text is built inline based on emailStatus — when emailStatus is something unexpected (neither 'sent' nor 'failed'/null) the title silently falls through to the 'Share invite link' branch. Add a default case.

Wizard does not echo the default_password returned by POST /api/users/create when send_invite=true and admin omitted password — backend generates a temp password, but lastUserInvite.tempPassword is only shown if admin set one (Users.jsx ln 785). Customers receiving the email link will reset it; but the admin loses sight of the generated temp password for ops audit. Confirm intent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every required selector & flow from the review request verified

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test user: test_wiz_408de353@example.com (role=operator+staff, assigned to 'Musango Bus Service', pending_verification). No cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: (1) Login flow: /admin/login first shows a splash with a 'Login to Your Account' button — must click it before the email/password form is rendered. After login user lands on /admin/analytics. (2) Wizard entry: header 'Add User' is a SPLIT button — click [data-testid='add-user-dropdown'] to open popover, then [data-testid='standard-add-btn'] to launch wizard. The 'Invite User' branch navigates to the invitations tab instead. (3) Selectors verified: setup-wizard, wizard-step-indicator-{basics,role,permissions}, wizard-next-btn, wizard-back-btn, wizard-finish-btn, wiz-user-{name,email,phone,password,invite-toggle}, wiz-user-role-{owner,manager,staff,customer,admin}, wiz-operator-picker, wiz-user-operator, wiz-user-perm-<perm-id>, user-invite-result-dialog, user-invite-link-text, copy-user-invite-link-btn, user-invite-result-done-btn. (4) Email-status note: Resend is sandbox-restricted — invite_email_status='failed' is EXPECTED for non-allowlisted addresses; dialog title flips between '✉️ Invitation sent' and '🔗 Share invite link' accordingly. Invite link is the source of truth. (5) Existing operators available in the picker: Musango Bus Service plus 5 others — fine for staff-role tests.
rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. Pre-existing carry-over: Radix DialogContent missing DialogTitle a11y warning (already noted in iter 161) still emits on wizard + invite-result dialog open.
